title: Gooey Romantic Chocolate Pancake
description: An earthy and gooey Slovakian dish featuring dark chocolate in a vegetarian-friendly recipe perfect for romantic breakfasts.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a baking dish with cooking spray.
In a mixing bowl, sift together flour and baking powder. Add sugar and salt; mix well.
Add oil, non-dairy milk, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix until smooth without overmixing.
Fold in dark chocolate chunks into the batter using your hands or a spoon.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
Serve warm as dessert with whipped cream and fresh berries if desired.
